creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
remko       2008-06-13 09:03:27 UTC

  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:
    en/platforms/amd64   motherboards.sgml 
  Log:
  Add a few motherboards to the list of tested amd64 boards:
  
  - Add ASRock ALiveNF6G-DVI (tested with 7.0-PRERELEASE)
    PR:             www/121054
  Submitted by:   Svein Skogen <svein@d80.iso100.no>
  
  - Add Asus A8V-Deluxe (tested with 6.2-STABLE)
    PR:             www/115516
  Submitted by:   Martin Matuska <mm@FreeBSD.org>
  
  - Add Gigabyte GA-MA770-DS3 motherboard (tested with 6.3-PRERELEASE)
    PR:             www/120435
  Submitted by:   Alexander Konovalenko <alexkono2000@yahoo.com>
  
  - Add Gigabyte GA-P35-DS4 (tested with 7.0-STABLE)
    PR:             www/121613
  Submitted by:   Torsten Hantzsche <thantzsche@kabelmail.de>
  
  - Add Intel DG31PR motherboard (tested with 7.0-RELEASE)
    PR:             www/124298
  Submitted by:   Paul J Murphy <paul@inetstat.net>
  
  - Add Intel DG965RYCK motherboard (tested with 7.0-CURRENT)
    PR:             www/116805
  Submitted by:   TJ Varghese <tjvarghese@gmail.com>
  
  - Add MSI K9N SLI Platinum (tested with 6.3-RELEASE)
    PR:             www/121069
  Submitted by:   Diego Arias <dak.col@gmail.com>
  
  - Add MSI P6N-Platinum (tested with 6.2-RELEASE)
    PR:             www/119177
  Submitted by:   comperr <comperr@gmail.com>
  
  - Add the Sun Blade X6220 (Tested with 7.0-RELEASE)
    PR:             www/124246
  Submitted By:   Gavin Akkinson <gavin@FreeBSD.org>
  
  - Add the Sun Blade X8420 (Tested with 7.0-RELEASE)
    PR:             www/123307
  Submitted By:   Gavin Akkinson <gavin@FreeBSD.org>
  
  All patches were created/bundled by:    gavin
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.140     +93 -1     www/en/platforms/amd64/motherboards.sgml
